subject: Template matching issue
body:
Hi Warp team,

I have been running template matching on some yeast tomograms and am not 
getting any picks above lowest threshold (3). Most picks have scores of 
rlnAutopickFigureOfMerit ~1.5.

I have tried:

   - different templates
   - different pixel size (10, 20 A)
   - whitening or no whitening
   - low pass filtering 


Any suggestions? Could this be an error somewhere in tomogram 
reconstruction?

[image: image.png]

Thanks in advance,
Laina
